project.name: fluxtion-wasm-host-emitter
project.description: Prototype (P5a): emits the @JSExport WASM host shell + its @JSExportClasses Main for a given Fluxtion SEP, as plain-string templating with ZERO compiler dependency. The output is byte-identical (modulo the processor name) to the hand-written JsonHost in examples/capabilities — proven by a golden test. The fluxtion-compiler generator-core later calls this from its generateWasmHost(true) path. Deliberately standalone so the template is de-risked before the compiler change. NOT published to repsy.
